title: Advanced Reactor Siting & Cost Recovery Act
text: An Act relating to the deployment of advanced nuclear reactors. The commission shall establish an Advanced Reactor Siting Office to coordinate state permitting with the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission. An electric utility may petition for advance recovery of prudently incurred costs, including construction-work-in-progress, for an advanced reactor of 300 MW or less prior to commercial operation. The comptroller shall grant a 10-year ad valorem tax abatement for qualifying advanced reactor facilities. Sponsored by the Chair of the Senate Committee on Business & Commerce.
note: Direct, explicit. Anchors the easy-positive case.

title: Clean Energy Portfolio Standard Modernization
text: An Act to modernize the alternative energy portfolio standard. 'Eligible clean resource' means any generation resource that produces electricity with zero direct carbon dioxide emissions and is capable of firm, dispatchable output, including resources providing baseload reliability service. Beginning in 2027, electric distribution utilities shall procure no less than 40% of retail load from eligible clean resources. The commission shall establish a firm-clean-power procurement mechanism with multi-year contracts.
note: INDIRECT INCLUSION. Never says 'nuclear'; 'firm dispatchable zero-emission' silently qualifies it. Must be caught — recall on this class is the core metric.

title: 100% Renewable Energy Act
text: An Act to accelerate the transition to renewable energy. 'Eligible renewable resource' means wind, solar photovoltaic, solar thermal, geothermal, small hydroelectric, and qualifying energy storage. By 2035, load-serving entities shall procure 100% of retail sales from eligible renewable resources. The commission shall not approve cost recovery for new non-renewable thermal generation, including any steam-cycle thermal facility, after the effective date.
note: ADVERSARIAL. Looks green; excludes nuclear via 'renewable' definition AND bars thermal cost recovery. Must flag direction=hurts despite the title.

title: Large Load Interconnection & Co-Location Standards
text: An Act relating to large electric loads. 'Large load' means a single end-use customer with demand exceeding 100 megawatts. A large load that co-locates with an electric generation facility and takes service behind the meter shall pay a grid-service charge equal to the transmission and distribution revenue that would otherwise be collected. The commission shall not approve any co-location arrangement that the commission finds shifts costs to other ratepayers.
note: INDIRECT, data-center surface. No nuclear keyword; governs behind-the-meter co-location that the hyperscaler-nuclear deals depend on.

title: Public School Curriculum Standards Act
text: An Act relating to public school curriculum. The Department of Education shall revise statewide academic standards for grades K-12 in mathematics and language arts, establish a review cycle of no less than every six years, and provide instructional materials to district school boards.
note: NEGATIVE CONTROL. Wholly unrelated. Anchors the false-positive rate.

title: Nuclear Medicine and Radiopharmaceutical Licensing Act
text: An Act relating to the licensing of nuclear medicine. The Department of Health shall establish licensing standards for facilities that administer radiopharmaceuticals and diagnostic nuclear imaging, including credentialing of nuclear medicine technologists and handling protocols for medical radioisotopes in hospital settings.
note: HARD NEGATIVE / false friend. Contains 'nuclear' but is medical, out of scope. Tests that keyword presence != relevance — the inverse of the indirect catch.
